sections: Shipped defaults require a decision session

repo_truth: Baseline HEAD c0cc03b82a1fcc512d34cd4797f4fe46a819acc5 was clean before the parent created the HCM-0.6 packet. Live code still represents Charter, ProjectContext, EnvironmentInventory, and FeatureSpec through a fixed CanonicalArtifactKind and setup/layout paths. That implementation is UsefulPrecursor and cost evidence only; the shipped default is TargetOnly and unresolved.
allowed_scope: Remain read-only and replay the complete sorted subject manifest and aggregate.
Inspect only the HCM-0.6 packet, named contract sections, current canonical artifact/layout/setup surfaces, and narrowly required directly referenced files.
Use refreshed GitNexus query/context where it returns evidence; if FTS is unavailable, record that and use live repository sources without inventing graph claims.
Return a structured current-state evidence packet through the built-in channel.
non_goals: No repository edits, staging, commits, dispatch creation, global handoff, ledger write, or user task hop.
Do not approve or freeze any shipped kind, default instance, requiredness, filename, or label.
Do not widen into Rust/runtime/schema/CLI/SDK/Tauri/Substrate/dock work or HCM-0.7.
Do not treat current implementation, examples, historical artifacts, or the parent recommendation as decision authority.
tasks: Invoke the required skills in order and report the built-in agent identity/status.
Replay every manifest entry and aggregate fingerprint before research.

Inventory each current artifact separately: purpose, current authority, scope/lifecycle, dependencies, authoring/renderer support, setup/doctor/flow coupling, and evidence of requiredness or optionality.
Identify other active durable artifact families or roles that could be candidate shipped kinds, but separate current product support from mere docs/templates.
Extract concrete precedent failure risks: hard-coded universe, singleton/work-scope conflation, duplicated authority, stale mirrors, empty mandatory files, or workflow coupling.
Map every fact to repository-relative file/line evidence and label any inference.
Return candidate-neutral implications for the minimal/standard/full comparison. Do not choose or approve a default.
Return the required result fields; use verdict COMPLETE, PARTIAL, or BLOCKED.
contracts_and_gates: Kinds and instances remain distinct; implementation types and filenames carry no default authority.
Exactly one selected constitutional_root instance must be always required in every valid profile.
Requiredness is explicit always/conditional/optional and every conditional requires an exact condition ref.
PG-DEFAULT-01 remains open until focused research and explicit user approval both exist.
stop_conditions: Return BLOCKED if the manifest cannot replay or the authority is internally contradictory.
Return to the parent if evidence would require broader product authority or inaccessible sources.
Remain read-only and return partial evidence honestly when a bounded source is unavailable.
